nasb.text: The Lord will do to them just as He did to Sihon and Og, the kings of the Amorites, and to their land, when He destroyed them.

esv.text: And the Lord will do to them as he did to Sihon and Og, the kings of the Amorites, and to their land, when he destroyed them.

cnv.text: 耶和華對待他們，必好像從前對待他消滅的亞摩利人的兩個王西宏和噩，以及他們的國一樣。

ccb.text: 耶和华要毁灭那里的各族，像毁灭亚摩利二王西宏和噩及其国家一样。
